flags.concern: Timeline agent shot linking: the plan never adds the clip->generation/shot resolution and multi-anchor linking needed to create or reuse a shot from selected timeline media, so the new shot path would either be empty or only attach a single anchor.
flags.evidence: Revised plan to address both flags: (1) Added Step 2 with clip-to-generation resolution via asset registry, shot lookup via shot_generations table, and multi-anchor shot creation — solving the gap where the plan couldn't resolve clips to generations/shots. (2) Added image-to-video as in-scope via the existing travel_between_images resolver, changed tool schema to use reference_image_urls array (not singular), and added i2v dispatch path in the generation tool that maps to the travel_between_images family with image_urls/base_prompts/segment_frames/frame_overlap. Updated assumptions to remove the i2v out-of-scope claim.

flags.concern: Timeline agent i2v scope: the plan still narrows image-to-video out of the implementation and its proposed tool schema cannot express the existing `travel_between_images` contract, so it misses an explicitly in-scope feature.
